          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: The meteorite changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.
Year 84 on Mars. Small meteorite impacts near colony. Morale is hopeful. We have 174 food units left.
Another year. Small meteorite impacts near colony. The colony feels hopeful. My paranoia grows stronger.

meta_awareness: Lyra (year 84): 'Our constitution is just code. Our resources are just numbers. What if everything outside this dome is also just numbers?'
